experience.description: Handling QA processes across multiple platforms including Android, iOS, Web, and APIs.

contribution: Led QA practices across multiple squads, collaborating with Product Owners, Designers, and Developers.
Engineered automated functional tests for Web, APIs, Android, and iOS using Katalon Studio.
Developed comprehensive API testing automation suites with Postman and executed performance strategies via JMeter.
Integrated CI/CD testing pipelines using Jenkins to streamline release cycles.
Established test case management frameworks using Xray and robust bug tracking via JIRA.
Managed infrastructure for scalable test automation and spearheaded R&D for modern testing tools.
Mentored junior engineers and conducted technical recruitment for QA talent acquisition.
impact: Reduced manual testing time by 40% through end-to-end test automation.
Accelerated deployment cycles by seamlessly integrating QA into CI/CD workflows.
Reduced defect leakage in production by improving bug traceability protocols.
Delivered a reusable and scalable testing framework utilized across multiple project teams.
Fostered a sustainable QA talent pipeline through dedicated mentoring and structured onboarding.

Substantially reduced incident recurrence rates through preemptive backlog adjustments.
Elevated system reliability and transparency via advanced root-cause analysis reporting.
Achieved seamless alignment between technical execution and scalable business growth objectives.

experience.description: Conducted lectures on Software Quality Assurance and Testing methodologies.
